primarySetting: The whole story takes place in ONE cozy child's bedroom at night, the evening before a morning medical check-up. Warm bedside lamp light, a bed with a soft blanket, a bedside table, a rug, a window with night outside, and tomorrow's shoes and folded clothes set ready on the floor. It is the SAME night bedroom on every page — never a clinic, never daylight, never another room, never outdoors.

fixedAnchors.label: the child's bed
fixedAnchors.description: The same child's bed with the same headboard and the same soft blanket every page.

fixedAnchors.label: tomorrow's shoes
fixedAnchors.description: The same single pair of shoes set ready for tomorrow, standing on the floor beside the bed all story.

fixedAnchors.label: the night bedroom
fixedAnchors.description: The same cozy bedroom at night with warm bedside lamp light — not a clinic, not daylight.

allowedZones.description: One cozy child's bedroom at night before a morning check-up. Warm bedside lamp, bed with a soft blanket, bedside table, rug on the floor, window with night outside. Tomorrow's shoes and folded clothes stand ready on the floor near the bed. Same room, warm and safe — NOT a clinic, NOT daylight, NOT another room, NOT outdoors.
stableGeometry: same bed against the same wall
same bedside table beside the bed
same rug on the floor by the bed
tomorrow's shoes standing ready on the floor near the bed
warm bedside lamp glow, night beyond the window
allowedCameraAccess: medium wide showing bed, rug and shoes

forbiddenDrift: more than one bunny / duplicate or cloned rabbit
duplicate or cloned child / two children protagonists
redesigning the bedroom set between pages
transitionRules: Stay in the SAME night bedroom on every page — the camera may move, the room must not redesign.
Never cut to a clinic, a daytime room, another room, or outdoors — the check-up is only tomorrow and is never shown.
Tomorrow's shoes stay standing ready by the bed throughout; the note is the only object whose state changes.

scenes.label: The night bedroom
scenes.description: One cozy child's bedroom at night, the evening before a morning medical check-up. The single set for the whole book.

recurringObjects.label: the child's bed
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME child's bed every page — same headboard shape and the same soft blanket. A child's bed, never a crib, bunk bed, or hospital bed.
forbiddenDrift: a different bed design between pages
a crib, bunk bed, or hospital bed

stateTimeline.state: the child lies awake under the blanket
the child watches from under the blanket, hands near the chin
the child sits on the edge of the bed, bare feet reaching the rug
the child is tucked peacefully back under the blanket

recurringObjects.label: tomorrow's shoes
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME single pair of small shoes set ready for tomorrow, standing neatly together on the floor beside the bed. The same shoes throughout — not slippers, not a second pair.
forbiddenDrift: shoes moved far from the bed

stateTimeline.state: standing ready on the floor beside the bed, with tomorrow's folded clothes

recurringObjects.label: the small note for tomorrow
recurringObjects.identity: A SINGLE small piece of note paper the child prepares for tomorrow. The same small note throughout — not a book, not a letter, not a sheet of many pages.
forbiddenDrift: a book, letter, or large sheet instead of a small note
printed or typed text on the note

stateTimeline.state: blank, resting on the bedside table
the child draws two simple little feet on it with an oversized pencil
the child holds the small note while opening a trembling fist
resting on the floor beside tomorrow's shoes

forbiddenDrift: a clinic, hospital, exam room, or any medical setting
daylight or a bright daytime room
any room other than this one night bedroom
more than one bunny or a duplicate child

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Camera may move closer or wider per PageShot; same night bedroom holds.
pagePlans.pageAction: Cozy bedroom at night. The child lies awake under the blanket, looking toward the shoes and folded clothes set ready for tomorrow on the floor. Warm bedside lamp, worried but safe mood. NO bunny yet.

visibleAnchors: Bunny Ometz with a heart badge
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Close 3-4 on Bunny's arrival; same bedroom.
pagePlans.pageAction: Something soft hops onto the edge of the bed — Bunny Ometz, a small rabbit with long ears and a heart badge on his chest. He tries a brave pose but both ears flop down. The child watches, surprised. EXACTLY ONE bunny.

visibleAnchors: Bunny with one ear up one hiding
pagePlans.pageAction: Bunny sits near the child's blanket, one ear popping up and the other hiding near his cheek, touching his heart badge gently. The child begins to relax into curiosity. NO clinic tools.

visibleAnchors: Bunny's small feet on the blanket
pagePlans.pageAction: Bunny places both small feet firmly on the blanket, showing they tremble but stay. The child watches from under the blanket, hands near the chin. Warm intimate bedtime scene.

visibleAnchors: the child sitting on the bed edge
bare feet on the rug beside Bunny's feet
pagePlans.allowedVariation: 3-4 of bed edge and rug; same bedroom.
pagePlans.pageAction: The child sits on the edge of the bed with bare feet placed on the rug beside Bunny's feet. Bunny's heart badge is visible; his ears are uneven but calm. Tomorrow's shoes stand ready nearby.

visibleAnchors: the small note on the bedside table
the child drawing two little feet
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Close 3-4 at the bedside table; same bedroom.
pagePlans.pageAction: The child draws two simple little feet on the small note at the bedside table. Bunny comically carries an oversized pencil, long ears dragging softly. Heart badge visible. Cozy night light.

visibleAnchors: the child holding the small note
a trembling fist opening one finger
Bunny with one ear raised one down
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Close on hands and note; same bedroom.
pagePlans.pageAction: Close-up of the child holding the small note and slowly opening a trembling fist — one finger, then more. Bunny sits nearby with one ear raised hopefully and one ear still down. Safe bedtime mood.

visibleAnchors: the small note resting beside tomorrow's shoes
Bunny curled asleep near his heart badge
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Wide front of the whole room; same bedroom, night stillness.
pagePlans.pageAction: Final cozy bedroom shot. The child is tucked peacefully in bed. The small note rests on the floor beside tomorrow's shoes. Bunny sleeps curled near his heart badge, one long ear still slightly awake. Warm night stillness.
